burst.msg_body: Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 256 in loop 'W_FLAT' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_weight'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
Could not burst due to multiple potential reads to the same bundle in the same region.

Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 256 in loop 'LOAD_B' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_param'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 256 in loop 'LOAD_G' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_param'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 256 in loop 'LOAD_BE' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_param'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 256 in loop 'LOAD_ROW0' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_in'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
